title: Spawn-Proofed Villagers
description: Prevents hostile mob spawns near villagers, as if they were players.
body:
# Spawn-Proof Villagers

Prevents the spawning of mobs near villagers, as if they were players.

The default spawn-proofing radius is the same as players. It can be configured in the gamerules.

Iron Golems and Cats are not prevented from spawning, since they are not natively affected by the presence of players
